## 🏗️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / Refactoring (code cleanup, project scaffolding, dependencies)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adding or structuring test suites)

- [ ] **Architecture Tests:** Verified layer boundaries and domain purity using `NetArchTest`.

- [ ] **Integration Tests:** (Pending implementation) Scaffolding ready to boot the API and Postgres via .NET Aspire.
